title: Yesterday IPL match result: SRH storm into top four after thrilling win over CSK
description: Sunrisers Hyderabad surged into the top four with a 10-run victory over Chennai Super Kings. Eshan Malinga and Shivang Kumar led SRH's bowling charge, restricting CSK to 184/8 while chasing 195. Despite an explosive start, SRH's batting faltered, but Heinrich Klaasen's fifty anchored their total.
